job_description:
• Identify and implement performance optimizationsDrive innovation in agent experiences while evaluating new AI and generative technologies to enhance the overall platform.
• 3+ years of professional Software Engineering experience in a SaaS environment Expert-level Apex, LWC, and SOQL/SOSL.
• Full-stack development skills (backend & frontend), including JAVA/APEX, LWC, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
• Advanced proficiency in Salesforce Flow (the primary engine for Agentforce actions) Strong foundation in object-oriented programming principles, design patterns, software architecture, and test-driven developmentExpert in Salesforce SOQL, SOSL, DML operations, governor limits, Sales Cloud, and Service CloudExperience with automated testing frameworks (JUnit, Selenium) and maintaining code coverage standardsProven experience with REST/SOAP APIs, Event-Driven Architecture (Platform Events, CDC), and JSON handling Proficiency with SFDX, Git-based version control, and automated testing frameworks (Jest, JUnit, Selenium) Strong analytical skills with the ability to debug complex issues.
• A related technical degree required Hands-on experience with Agentforce, Prompt Builder, Prompt Engineering.
• Experience with Salesforce Data Cloud, including data mapping, identity resolution, and vector database concepts.
• Knowledge of the evolving LLM landscape (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Gemini) and prompt optimization techniques Experience supporting global rollouts of agent solutions and scaling across multiple regions.
• Salesforce certifications or equivalent expertise in AI-enhanced CRM solutionsExperience with SaaS/PaaS architectures and large-scale enterprise agent implementations.

• 4+ years of experience designing and delivering software products from start to finish as part of a cross-functional team.
• Ability to deliver solutions on time independently and with on-site and distributed teamsDeep understanding of user-centered design methods and best practices, and experience using analytics and research to drive decisions and develop product iterations.
• Ability to explore ideas, persuade, and build consensus on fast-moving projects with varying degrees of ambiguity and deadlines.
• Capability to deliver original, high-quality design work that is conceptually strong, meets business needs, and is at the right level of fidelity for each phase of a project.
• Strong communication and active listening skills, with an ability to build and develop close, trusting relationships with a wide variety of stakeholders across product and engineering.
• BA/BS or MA/MS in a design-related field, or equivalent experience.
• Oversee multiple web and mobile application features, interfaces, and experiences.

job_title: Field Engineer I - Turbo Machinery Controls Systems
job_description:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• In this role, you will play a key part in defining software requirements, designing embedded solutions, and verifying system performance, ensuring our maintenance systems meet the evolving needs of modern aircraft.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• You’ll bridge engineering and IT to ensure complex aerospace development ecosystems perform at scale, meet rigorous standards, and align with regulatory and export‑controlled requirements.
• This position is ideal for engineers experienced in modern software development methodologies, debugging, and performance optimization, who thrive in highly technical, cross‑functional environments.
